collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (25 total Queries, 25 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (@@OPTIONS | 256) = @@OPTIONS THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS qi

SELECT "l"."nama_barang", SUM(l.qty) as total_qty FROM "GA_Inventory"."dbo"."log_karyawan" "l" JOIN "GA_Inventory"."dbo"."items" "i" ON "l"."item_id" = "i"."id" WHERE "i"."kategori" = 'Consumable' AND "l"."status_peminjaman" != 'Reversed' GROUP BY "l"."nama_barang" ORDER BY "total_qty" DESC OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 5 ROWS ONLY

SELECT "l"."nama_barang", SUM(l.qty * i.harga_satuan) as total_rp FROM "GA_Inventory"."dbo"."log_karyawan" "l" JOIN "GA_Inventory"."dbo"."items" "i" ON "l"."item_id" = "i"."id" WHERE "i"."kategori" = 'Consumable' AND "l"."status_peminjaman" != 'Reversed' GROUP BY "l"."nama_barang" ORDER BY "total_rp" DESC OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 5 ROWS ONLY

SELECT TOP 6 FORMAT(tanggal_ambil, 'MMM yyyy') as bulan, SUM(qty) as total_qty FROM log_karyawan WHERE status_peminjaman != 'Reversed' GROUP BY FORMAT(tanggal_ambil, 'MMM yyyy'), YEAR(tanggal_ambil), MONTH(tanggal_ambil) ORDER BY YEAR(tanggal_ambil) DESC, MONTH(tanggal_ambil) DESC
